zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edney是John Ednye的女兒，於1537年6月28日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。她於1558年7月10日與Robert Bennett在英國薩默塞特維維利斯可姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年6月28日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維維利斯可姆享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維維利斯可姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edney是John Ednye的女儿，于1537年6月28日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特。她于1558年7月10日与Robert Bennett在英国薩默塞特維維利斯可姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年6月28日在英国英格兰薩默塞特維維利斯可姆享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特維維利斯可姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Edney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English female personal name Idony, Edony, a French name from Latin Idonea, Idonia ‘suitable’, introduced to Britain after the Conquest.

variants.name: Ednie
meanings: Scottish (Fife): habitational name from Ednie in Saint Fergus (Aberdeenshire).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edney was born on 28 June 1537, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John Ednye. She married Robert Bennett on 10 July 1558, in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 28 June 1597, in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Robert Bennett le 10 juillet 1558, à Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 juin 1597, à Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à St Andrew's Church, Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Robert Bennett il 10 luglio 1558, nel Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edneyは1537年6月28日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでJohn Ednyeの娘として生まれた。1558年7月10日にイギリスソメルセトウィベリスコンベでRobert Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年6月28日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィベリスコンベで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウィベリスコンベスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Andrews Church, Wiveliscombe, Taun: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 위벨리스코브 스트 앤드루'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edney(은)는 1537년 6월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 John Ednye의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1558년 7월 10일 영국 서머세트 위벨리스코브에서 Robert Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 6월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 위벨리스코브에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 위벨리스코브 스트 앤드루'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edney nasceu em 28 de junho de 1537, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de John Ednye. Ela casou-se com Robert Bennett em 10 de julho de 1558, em Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de junho de 1597, em Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em St Andrew's Church, Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Andrews Church, Wiveliscombe, Taun: ст андрю'с чурч, вивелискомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edney родилась 28 июня 1537 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John Ednye. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Bennett 10 июля 1558 г. в местности вивелискомб, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 28 июня 1597 г. в местности вивелискомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности ст андрю'с чурч, вивелискомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
